_focus: Parry. Every chasm is crossed by parrying floating pink orbs mid-air (up + forward bounce), and Spitters line the route so you also parry their pink bolts. The gauntlet before THE OVERCLOCK.
_pacing: 0-7 parry a Spitter's bolts · 8-25 first two orb crossings · 26-48 plat climb + weapon block + a Drone · 49-68 the long double crossing · 69-77 run to the gate.
